name: Trapped With Jester†
description:
"Flirt or die"

The story is about you making a contract with a demon, which is a clown Jester, but you can't remember how you ended up here. But one thing is for sure, you made a contract with the demon because you were betrayed by your family. You can choose to take revenge or you can choose not to. If I didn't explain everything or got anything wrong, I apologize, but you can watch the full game on YouTube. It's really fun!

✦•··························•✦•·····························•

Enjoy!
creator: Omamikiri
